name: Plivo CPaaS Voice & SMS API
what_it_does: Plivo CPaaS API for programmable voice and SMS communications. Alternative to Twilio with competitive pricing. Enables AI agents to send/receive SMS, make outbound calls, manage IVR flows, and handle inbound communications. Strong international coverage with carrier-grade infrastructure.
use_cases: Sending transactional SMS notifications from customer communication agents
Making outbound voice calls and IVR flows from customer engagement agents
Handling inbound SMS and call routing from customer service automation agents
Number provisioning and phone number management from telephony admin agents
not_for: Consumer calling apps without proper carrier compliance
High-volume A2P SMS without 10DLC registration (US requirement)
best_when: A developer wants a Twilio alternative with lower pricing for voice and SMS — building communication automation with competitive per-minute and per-message rates.
avoid_when: You need extensive ecosystem integrations — Twilio has more third-party integrations. Plivo is more developer-focused with less no-code tooling. PRIVACY: Call and SMS data is customer communication data.

auth.notes: Plivo Auth ID + Auth Token (HTTP Basic Auth). Separate credentials for live and sandbox accounts. Tokens available in Plivo Console.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Plivo sandbox free for testing; production usage billed per use
pricing.paid_tiers: Voice from $0.0045/min; SMS from $0.0035/message; competitive with Twilio
pricing.notes: Pay-as-you-go pricing with no monthly fees. Cheaper than Twilio for many use cases.

performance.rate_limits: Plivo API: rate limits vary by account tier; documented per endpoint

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: SMS and call data are customer communications — handle per privacy laws
US A2P SMS requires 10DLC registration to avoid carrier filtering
No public MCP server — REST API or SDK required
Sandbox numbers don't work for real calls — test carefully before production
International SMS delivery varies by carrier and country regulations
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer call and SMS data. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. Auth token must be secured. US A2P SMS compliance (10DLC) required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer communications data. SOC2 and GDPR. A2P SMS compliance required. Auth tokens must be secured.
